channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S.-Iran ceasefire tested as U.S. guides ships through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The U.S.-Iran standoff erupted in violence again as Project Freedom challenged Tehran's chokehold on shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: What to know about Tuesday's primaries in Ohio and Indiana
item.description: Voters are going to the polls Tuesday in Ohio and Indiana — in the Buckeye State, they'll be casting ballots in Senate, House and governor's primary r...

item.title: 2 killed in Caribbean strike on alleged 'narco-trafficking' boat, Pentagon says
item.description: U.S. Southern Command said in a statement that it struck an alleged "narco-trafficking" boat in the Caribbean Sea on Monday, killing two people.

item.title: Latest U.S. strike on alleged drug boat kills 2 in Caribbean, military says
item.description: The U.S. military says it launched another strike on a boat accused of ferrying drugs in the Caribbean Sea, killing two people, as the number of recen...
